zh.lifeSummary: 當Boson II de TURENNE於1110年6月26日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫時，他的父親Raymond Turenne I34歲，母親Mathilde de Perche34歲。他於1128年與Eustorgie d'Anduze在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1143年6月19日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰道多沙吉包爾-拉-洛享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Boson II de TURENNE于1110年6月26日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫时，他的父亲Raymond Turenne I34岁，母亲Mathilde de Perche34岁。他于1128年与Eustorgie d'Anduze在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1143年6月19日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰道多沙吉包爾-拉-洛享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: TURENNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Boson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of North German, Danish, and Norwegian   Boysen  .
English: from the Middle English personal name Boie (Old English Boia) + -son.

variants.name: Boysen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerd, Hans, Erwin, Hermann, Juergen, Lorenz, Siegfried.
North German, Danish, and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Boye  .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Boson II de TURENNE was born on 26 June 1110, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Raymond Turenne I, was 34 and his mother, Mathilde de Perche, was 34. He married Eustorgie d'Anduze in 1128, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 19 June 1143, in Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Boson II de TURENNE est né le 26 juin 1110, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Raymond Turenne I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Perche, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Eustorgie d'Anduze en 1128, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 19 juin 1143, à Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Boson II de TURENNE am 26. Juni 1110 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raymond Turenne I 34 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Perche 34. Er hat 1128 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Eustorgie d'Anduze geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. Juni 1143 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Boson II de TURENNE è nato il il 26 giugno 1110 nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Raymond Turenne I, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Perche, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Eustorgie d'Anduze nel 1128, nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 19 giugno 1143, nel Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Boson II de TURENNEが1110年6月26日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンで生まれた時，父Raymond Turenne Iは34歳，母Mathilde de Percheは34歳であった。1128年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンでEustorgie d'Anduzeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1143年6月19日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインドールドグンサイント-プアウル-ラ-ロチェで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Boson II de TURENNE(이)가 1110년 6월 26일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raymond Turenne I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Perche(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1128년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 Eustorgie d'Anduze(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1143년 6월 19일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 도르도그니 세인트-폴-라-록헤에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.26 JUN 1110–19 JUN 1143: 1110 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 26–1143 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 19

pt.26 JUN 1110–19 JUN 1143: 26 de junho de 1110–19 de junho de 1143
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Boson II de TURENNE nasceu em 26 de junho de 1110, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Raymond Turenne I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Perche, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Eustorgie d'Anduze em 1128, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 19 de junho de 1143, em Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Boson II de TURENNE родился 26 июня 1110 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Raymond Turenne I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Perche, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustorgie d'Anduze в 1128 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 19 июня 1143 г. в местности сеинт-поул-ла-рош, дордогн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 32 лет.

es.26 JUN 1110–19 JUN 1143: 26 de junio de 1110–19 de junio de 1143
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Boson II de TURENNE nació el 26 de junio de 1110, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Raymond Turenne I, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Perche, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eustorgie d'Anduze en 1128, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de junio de 1143, en Saint-Paul-la-Roche, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 32 años.
